---
title: "Licensing"
editor: visual
format: 
  html:
    mainfont: Poppins
    toc: true
    warning: false
    echo: false
---

```{r}

# files <- c("data.R", "functions.R")
# 
# invisible(
# lapply(files, function(f) {
#   source(here::here("Analysis", "care-giving", f))
# })
# )

```

## Licenses

### Licenses by Age

### Licenses by Age and Gender
